title: Operate pressurised irrigation systems
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Operate pressurised irrigation systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Carry out pre-start checks

pcs.text: Confirm activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Select required tools and equipment and check for safe operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select required tools and equipment and check for safe operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select required tools and equipment and check for safe operation.

pcs.text: Select, fit and use personal protective equipment applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit and use personal protective equipment applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit and use personal protective equipment applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Check water, power, fuel and lubricants to confirm all are available and the control system is operational
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check water, power, fuel and lubricants to confirm all are available and the control system is operational?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check water, power, fuel and lubricants to confirm all are available and the control system is operational.

pcs.text: Prime pumps, if necessary, and open or close valves and controls as directed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prime pumps, if necessary, and open or close valves and controls as directed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prime pumps, if necessary, and open or close valves and controls as directed.

pcs.text: Calibrate pressure and flow testing equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calibrate pressure and flow testing equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calibrate pressure and flow testing equipment.

pcs.text: Carry out other pre-start system checks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out other pre-start system checks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out other pre-start system checks.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Carry out pre-start checks

elements.title: Inspect and operate the system

pcs.text: Implement start up sequence according to operation and maintenance procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement start up sequence according to operation and maintenance procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement start up sequence according to operation and maintenance procedures.

pcs.text: Check emitter spacing against the irrigation plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check emitter spacing against the irrigation plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check emitter spacing against the irrigation plan.

pcs.text: Adjust water pressure as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Adjust water pressure as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Adjust water pressure as required.

pcs.text: Clear and replace filters as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clear and replace filters as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clear and replace filters as required.

pcs.text: Correct or repair all malfunctions, leaks and blockages and report
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Correct or repair all malfunctions, leaks and blockages and report?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Correct or repair all malfunctions, leaks and blockages and report.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Inspect and operate the system

elements.title: Monitor irrigation system performance

pcs.text: Check emitters for output
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check emitters for output?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check emitters for output.

pcs.text: Calculate application rate of water
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate application rate of water?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate application rate of water.

pcs.text: Check the water distribution pattern in the irrigated area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check the water distribution pattern in the irrigated area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check the water distribution pattern in the irrigated area.

pcs.text: Monitor moisture levels in the root zone
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor moisture levels in the root zone?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor moisture levels in the root zone.

pcs.text: Minimise environmental impacts of the operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Minimise environmental impacts of the operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Minimise environmental impacts of the operation.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Monitor irrigation system performance

elements.title: Shut down irrigation system

pcs.text: Apply water for sufficient time to achieve required soil moisture levels and allow for weather conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply water for sufficient time to achieve required soil moisture levels and allow for weather conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply water for sufficient time to achieve required soil moisture levels and allow for weather conditions.

pcs.text: Shut down system components and drain
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Shut down system components and drain?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Shut down system components and drain.

pcs.text: Record and report irrigation activities according to workplace recording procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and report irrigation activities according to workplace recording procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and report irrigation activities according to workplace recording procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Shut down irrigation system

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
